posts.author: official@open-social-network.network
posts.content: Open Social Network begins here: a page you own, posts you control, and a social web that does not depend on one platform.

posts.author: official@open-social-network.network
posts.content: Create a page, write posts, publish the public folder anywhere, and let any compatible app read it.

posts.author: official@open-social-network.network
posts.content: Our values are sovereignty, portability, interoperability, transparency, and a web where identity belongs to its creator.
